creator: awebster@connectalk.com
text:
Rendering pages with charts, such as Tickets view, at the bottom there is a selection to choose how to chart the list of tickets by status, etc.

Charts are not displayed, and the following lines show up in /var/log/httpd-error.log.
I've turned on RT debugging, but no clues there.

httpd in free(): error: pointer to wrong page
httpd in free(): error: pointer to wrong page
[Thu Mar 19 13:02:28 2009] [notice] child pid 72408 exit signal Abort trap (6)
[Thu Mar 19 13:02:28 2009] [notice] child pid 72406 exit signal Abort trap (6)

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 7.1-RELEASE from DVD media
freebsd-update to 7.1-RELEASE-p3
install portaudit
install cvsup-without-gui
install portupgrade
portupgrade -N perl5.8
portupgrade -N apache22
portupgrade -N rt38
portupgrade -N p5-GraphViz
lots of other manual dependency fixing, ultimately had to use rt-test-dependencies to figure out what was missing.

Access the tickets page and choose to display the results in a bar chart.
